name: Pingdingshan Tianan Coal. Mining Co., Ltd.
summary: Pingdingshan Tianan Coal. Mining Co., Ltd. engages in the mining, washing, processing, and sale of coal in China. It offers coking, fat, thermal, and smelted refined coal. The company was incorporated in 1998 and is based in Pingdingshan, China. Pingdingshan Tianan Coal. Mining Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of China Pingmei Shenma Energy Chemical Group Co., Ltd.
